mapper.select: SELECT stock_id , unique_no , item_name , qty , gross_weight , warehouse_id , del_yn , cont_no , position_area , decl_no , mem_id , out_date , reg_date FROM warehouse_stock WHERE cont_no = #{contNo} and position_area = #{positionArea}
SELECT * FROM IMPORT_MASTER WHERE import_number = #{declNo} AND #{declNo} LIKE 'IMP%'
SELECT * FROM EXPORT_MASTER WHERE export_number = #{declNo} AND #{declNo} LIKE 'EXP%'
SELECT * FROM ATTACHMENTS WHERE ref_id = #{declNo} or ref_id = #{contNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE warehouse_stock SET UNIQUE_NO = #{uniqueNo}, ITEM_NAME = #{itemName}, QTY = #{qty}, GROSS_WEIGHT = #{grossWeight}, REP_NAME = #{repName} WHERE stock_id = #{stockId}
mapper.select: SELECT BASE.AREA_CODE AS "AREA", COUNT(W.WAREHOUSE_ID) AS "COUNT" FROM ( SELECT CHR(64 + LEVEL) AS AREA_CODE FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 9 ) BASE LEFT OUTER JOIN WAREHOUSE_STOCK W ON SUBSTR(W.WAREHOUSE_ID, 1, 1) = BASE.AREA_CODE AND W.POSITION_AREA = #{positionArea} GROUP BY BASE.AREA_CODE ORDER BY "AREA"
